title: Senior Backend Engineer II
score_reasoning: Your backend experience and distributed systems foundation are strong, and the Senior Backend Engineer II title matches your career trajectory. However, the role's primary tech stack is Java/JVM, which is a significant gap—your production expertise is Python and Go. While your payment processing and transaction experience at Stackflo (€2M/month billing engine) maps well to LeafLink's financial workflows, and the regulated fintech environment aligns with your preferred industries, the Java requirement creates a meaningful friction point. The remote role is fully compatible with your Berlin base and Europe-first preferences. Growth potential is moderate because this is a lateral senior role rather than a stretch into technical leadership or systems architecture, and the Java migration would require ramp-up time.

red_flags: Primary tech stack is Java/JVM—you have no production Java experience
Kubernetes listed as required familiarity; you have only basic Docker experience
Role emphasizes event-driven architectures; you have limited production evidence beyond basic pub/sub
No mention of Python or Go, your core languages
Title is 'Level II' (potentially mid-senior boundary); growth trajectory unclear
